content: {"vocabulary":[{"word":"chemise","translation":"Hemd","pronunciation":"ʃəmiz","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Il porte une chemise bleue.","exampleTranslation":"Er trägt ein blaues Hemd.","usageNote":"Wird hauptsächlich für Herrenhemden verwendet."},{"word":"pantalon","translation":"Hose","pronunciation":"pɑ̃təlɔ̃","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Ce pantalon est noir.","exampleTranslation":"Diese Hose ist schwarz.","usageNote":"Kann für Männer- und Frauenhosen verwendet werden."},{"word":"robe","translation":"Rock","pronunciation":"ʁɔb","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Elle porte une robe rouge.","exampleTranslation":"Sie trägt einen roten Rock.","usageNote":"Bezieht sich auf Damenkleidung."},{"word":"manteau","translation":"Mantel","pronunciation":"mɑ̃to","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Il a un manteau gris.","exampleTranslation":"Er hat einen grauen Mantel.","usageNote":"Ein warmer Überzieher für kaltes Wetter."},{"word":"chapeau","translation":"Hut","pronunciation":"ʃapɔ","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le chapeau est noir.","exampleTranslation":"Der Hut ist schwarz.","usageNote":"Kann für alle Arten von Hüten stehen."},{"word":"chaussette","translation":"Socke","pronunciation":"ʃosɛt","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"J'ai deux chaussettes blanches.","exampleTranslation":"Ich habe zwei weiße Socken.","usageNote":"Im Plural: chaussettes."},{"word":"sweat","translation":"Sweatshirt","pronunciation":"swɛ","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Ce sweat est confortable.","exampleTranslation":"Dieses Sweatshirt ist bequem.","usageNote":"Kurzform von 'sweat-shirt'."},{"word":"pull","translation":"Pullover","pronunciation":"ply","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le pull est vert.","exampleTranslation":"Der Pullover ist grün.","usageNote":"Beliebter Begriff für einen warmen Strickpullover."},{"word":"jupe","translation":"Rock","pronunciation":"jyːp","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Ma jupe est rose.","exampleTranslation":"Mein Rock ist rosa.","usageNote":"Speziell für Damenröcke."},{"word":"robe de chambre","translation":"Nachthemd","pronunciation":"ʁɔb də ʃɑ̃br","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Il porte une robe de chambre.","exampleTranslation":"Er trägt ein Nachthemd.","usageNote":"Für zu Hause, nicht für draußen."},{"word":"t-shirt","translation":"T-Shirt","pronunciation":"tiʃaʁt","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"J'ai un t-shirt blanc.","exampleTranslation":"Ich habe ein weißes T-Shirt.","usageNote":"Kurzform für 'tee-shirt'."},{"word":"écharpe","translation":"Schal","pronunciation":"ekɑʁp","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Elle porte une écharpe rouge.","exampleTranslation":"Sie trägt einen roten Schal.","usageNote":"Wird um den Hals gewickelt."},{"word":"gants","translation":"Handschuhe","pronunciation":"ɡɑ̃","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Les gants sont noirs.","exampleTranslation":"Die Handschuhe sind schwarz.","usageNote":"Im Plural: gants."},{"word":"baskets","translation":"Sneaker","pronunciation":"baskɛt","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Elle porte des baskets blanches.","exampleTranslation":"Sie trägt weiße Sneaker.","usageNote":"Beliebter Begriff für Laufschuhe."},{"word":"chaussures","translation":"Schuhe","pronunciation":"ʃosyʁ","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Mes chaussures sont bleues.","exampleTranslation":"Meine Schuhe sind blau.","usageNote":"Im Plural: chaussures."}]}
